category_sources: Official Pieces docs at https://docs.pieces.app/products/cli document the Pieces CLI product.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/pieces-app/cli-agent uses the display name Pieces CLI.
source_facts.id is brew:pieces-cli and source_facts.name is pieces-cli.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/pieces-app/cli-agent links the same official CLI documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Pieces CLI documentation page.
repo_sources: Official repository https://github.com/pieces-app/cli-agent describes itself as the Pieces CLI for interacting with Pieces OS and links docs.pieces.app/products/cli.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/pieces-app/cli-agent describes interaction with PiecesOS, asset management, and PiecesOS features.
source_facts.description identifies a command-line tool for Pieces.app.
